validation.notes: All PowerShell scripts parse; every .ai/**/*.json parses; router -Command Status, -Command Next -DryRun, -Command Plan -DryRun, -Command Resume, -Command Configure all run cleanly. Pester tests are mocked; no real ollama invocation; no paid cloud quota consumed.

decisions: Fast-forward merge into main (no merge commit)
Feature branch deleted locally per branching strategy rule 7
No push to origin (push_authorization_required is true; the brief prohibits push)
Router written to UTF-8 without BOM (Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 emits a BOM by default in PowerShell 5.1; Out-File -Encoding utf8NoBOM is the canonical fix)
T-030 remains Ready; the queue is not advanced past it
